channel.title: Victoria H. Fan
channel.description: Recent content on Victoria H. Fan

item.title: About
item.description: Victoria Fan Medical Student, YSM Research Interests Visual neuroscience; retina Ophthalmic innovation -- Education MD, Yale School of Medicine (2020-) BS, Stanford University (2014-2018)

item.title: Patents & Publications
item.description: Patents Fan VH, Fernald R. Infant Health Monitor Patch with Microphone. U.S. Patent 10,657,786, filed December 01, 2016 and issued May 19, 2020. [reprint] Fan VH, Fernald R. Heated Mist Earache and Infection Treatment Device. U.S. Patent 10,420,679, filed April 21, 2017 and issued September 24, 2019. [reprint] Publications Madugula S, Gogliettino AR, Zaidi M, Aggarwal G, Kling A, Shah NP, Vilkhu R, Hays M, Nguyen H, Fan VH, Wu EG, Hottowy P, Sher A, Litke AM, Silva RA, Chichilnisky EJ (2020).

item.title: Other Projects
item.description: Written and arranged in MuseScore 3. Based on a popular song. Score and audio
